name: Tea Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix together brewed tea and tea leaves until well combined.
3. Add flour, dry milk, sugar, salt, butter, Egg Beaters, and yeast (or fast rising yeast) to the tea mixture. Stir until just incorporated.
4. Shape the dough into a loaf and place it in a greased baking dish.
5. Cover the dish with foil or plastic wrap.
6. Bake for 45-50 minutes, or until golden brown and crusty on top.
7. Remove from oven and let cool before slicing and serving.
Sweet Mode
